Order Helper
Lore Simulator
Settings

Select a Lorebook

Click a lorebook from the left panel to view and edit its entries.

You can also create a new lorebook or import one using the buttons in the sidebar.

×

World Info Macro Picker

This panel displays the currently active World Info entries, which will be injected into the prompt.

Drag and drop entries to re-order them, then click "Apply" to set new order values. Entries are loaded from the currently selected lorebook.

Enter text below to see which lorebook entries would be activated.

Activated Entries:
